meaning: 卡萨布兰卡[摩洛哥西北部港市](即达尔贝达
examples: The soundtrack of 'Casablanca' took weeks to edit.
Snuggle together while watching romantic movies (Casablanca, Audrey Hepburn are my favorite).
A special remastered version of Casablanca is being released.
Chaabi has committed to building a university in Casablanca in partnership with Indiana State University.
Major Strasser: My dear Mademoiselle, perhaps you have observed that in Casablanca, human life is cheap.
